scenario.title: TC_003_SCC_001 SCC login
scenario.step: When [Input] I login as 'p:SCCuser.supdew1' with password 'p:SCC.password'
And [Input] I click on 'User Name Header Button'
!-- And [Input] I click on 'Profile Header Button'
And [Assertion] Verify 'User Name Value' have attribute 'value' with 'p:SCCuser.supdew1' value

Then [Input] I click on 'logout Button'org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (8f0ce4f013ceb28759fda531d1fa9090)] -> xpath: //a[contains(text(),'خروج')]] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 130.0.6723.70, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 130.0.6723.91 (53ac07678369..., userDataDir: C:\Users\MBARGH~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:39605}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:39605/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 130.0.6723.70, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 8f0ce4f013ceb28759fda531d1fa9090
